## 2.3.3 ATCO Planning 6

### Additional comments

The number of ATCOs in OPS is lower than planned due to the higher than anticipated ATCOs who stopped working in OPS. As there is flexibility for the ATCOs in deciding to retire (between 55 and 57), it is difficult to accurately plan the outflow.

### Additional comments

### Description of the training process, including details on the effective failure rate and the process used to allocate newly qualified ATCOs between ACC, APP and TWR positions
